Title: Data Scientist, Buyer
Description:
Brief Info About Vinted

Our mission is to make second-hand the first choice, and we're looking for people who want to help us get there. Every day, we work together to help our members buy and sell pre-loved clothing and lifestyle items, giving each piece a second life – or even a third.

The Vinted Group is made up of three business units that support this mission:

Vinted Marketplace is Europe’s leading platform for second-hand fashion and a go-to destination for all kinds of pre-loved items, with a growing range of categories. Our platform connects millions of members across 20+ markets, helping great items find a new life.

Vinted Go enhances the shipping experience with a vast network of over 500,000 pick-up and drop-off points, partnering with more than 60 carriers across Europe, with added services like item verification for peace of mind on high-value pieces.

Vinted Pay is the newest part of the Vinted Group, dedicated to bringing secure, reliable payments to buyers and sellers across Europe. Seamlessly integrated into the Vinted app, it helps keep every transaction safe, efficient, and easy for our members.

Founded in 2008 in Lithuania, Vinted began as a way for friends to find new homes for clothes they no longer needed. In 2019, we became Lithuania's first unicorn! Today, our headquarters remain in Vilnius, and we've grown with offices across Europe, supported by a team of over 2,000 people.

Information About The Position

The Buyer Domain at Vinted is dedicated to creating a seamless, delightful, and highly engaging experience for our members as they search, discover, and purchase items. Our challenge is unique: unlike standard e-commerce, our peer-to-peer catalog consists of hundreds of millions of entirely unique, single-inventory listings, with millions of new items uploaded daily. Connecting the right buyer with the perfect item in real-time is at the very core of Vinted's success.

To tackle this challenge at scale, we are looking to bring talented Data Scientists into the Buyer Domain's two highly specialized, ML-focused teams:


Search Relevance: This team is responsible for the retrieval and ranking systems that power search queries across all markets. Their mission is to ensure our members can effortlessly find exactly what they are looking for in Vinted's vast, unique catalog. The team's ownership and focus areas include multi-stage search ranking pipelines, query intent classification, semantic dense retrieval, and the integration of ML relevance models with content policy controls, all optimized for real-time execution.
Recommender Relevance: This team owns the Recommender System that powers Vinted’s Homepage Feed and which is responsible for driving a significant portion of all discoveries and purchases across the platform. Their mission is to inspire our members by surfacing highly personalized, engaging, and relevant recommendations. The team's ownership and focus areas include deep sequence-based user modeling, real-time candidate generation and ranking, and exploration of diverse member interests, built to handle massive scale and high-throughput constraints.


We will work with you to match your background, technical interests, and experience with the team where you can drive the most impact. Regardless of the team you join, you will be a proactive product partner. We work in a highly collaborative culture to align on technical approaches, and we validate all changes through rigorous offline evaluation and online A/B testing on our custom-built, in-house Experimentation platform.

In this position, you’ll


Build and optimize end-to-end machine learning models for retrieval, ranking, and personalization (e.g. gradient boosting, two-tower architectures, sequence models, and neural rerankers).
Partner closely with platform and software engineers to serve models directly in our search and recommendation engines, optimizing for high throughput and millisecond-level latency budgets.
Lead or contribute to collaborative design proposals for new modeling approaches, features, or training pipelines.
Define tracking requirements, perform offline evaluations, and design and analyze online A/B tests to measure real-world business impact.
Collaborate with Data, Engineering and Product stakeholders to identify product opportunities, translate business problems into ML objectives, and align on technical trade-offs.

25 working days of holiday

Brief Info About Vinted

Our mission is to make second-hand the first choice, and we're looking for people who want to help us get there. Every day, we work together to help our members buy and sell pre-loved clothing and lifestyle items, giving each piece a second life – or even a third.

The Vinted Group is made up of three business units that support this mission:

Vinted Marketplace is Europe’s leading platform for second-hand fashion and a go-to destination for all kinds of pre-loved items, with a growing range of categories. Our platform connects millions of members across 20+ markets, helping great items find a new life.

Vinted Go enhances the shipping experience with a vast network of over 500,000 pick-up and drop-off points, partnering with more than 60 carriers across Europe, with added services like item verification for peace of mind on high-value pieces.

Vinted Pay is the newest part of the Vinted Group, dedicated to bringing secure, reliable payments to buyers and sellers across Europe. Seamlessly integrated into the Vinted app, it helps keep every transaction safe, efficient, and easy for our members.

Founded in 2008 in Lithuania, Vinted began as a way for friends to find new homes for clothes they no longer needed. In 2019, we became Lithuania's first unicorn! Today, our headquarters remain in Vilnius, and we've grown with offices across Europe, supported by a team of over 2,000 people.

Information About The Position

The Buyer Domain at Vinted is dedicated to creating a seamless, delightful, and highly engaging experience for our members as they search, discover, and purchase items. Our challenge is unique: unlike standard e-commerce, our peer-to-peer catalog consists of hundreds of millions of entirely unique, single-inventory listings, with millions of new items uploaded daily. Connecting the right buyer with the perfect item in real-time is at the very core of Vinted's success.

To tackle this challenge at scale, we are looking to bring talented Data Scientists into the Buyer Domain's two highly specialized, ML-focused teams:

  • Search Relevance: This team is responsible for the retrieval and ranking systems that power search queries across all markets. Their mission is to ensure our members can effortlessly find exactly what they are looking for in Vinted's vast, unique catalog. The team's ownership and focus areas include multi-stage search ranking pipelines, query intent classification, semantic dense retrieval, and the integration of ML relevance models with content policy controls, all optimized for real-time execution.
  • Recommender Relevance: This team owns the Recommender System that powers Vinted’s Homepage Feed and which is responsible for driving a significant portion of all discoveries and purchases across the platform. Their mission is to inspire our members by surfacing highly personalized, engaging, and relevant recommendations. The team's ownership and focus areas include deep sequence-based user modeling, real-time candidate generation and ranking, and exploration of diverse member interests, built to handle massive scale and high-throughput constraints.

We will work with you to match your background, technical interests, and experience with the team where you can drive the most impact. Regardless of the team you join, you will be a proactive product partner. We work in a highly collaborative culture to align on technical approaches, and we validate all changes through rigorous offline evaluation and online A/B testing on our custom-built, in-house Experimentation platform.

In this position, you’ll

  • Build and optimize end-to-end machine learning models for retrieval, ranking, and personalization (e.g. gradient boosting, two-tower architectures, sequence models, and neural rerankers).
  • Partner closely with platform and software engineers to serve models directly in our search and recommendation engines, optimizing for high throughput and millisecond-level latency budgets.
  • Lead or contribute to collaborative design proposals for new modeling approaches, features, or training pipelines.
  • Define tracking requirements, perform offline evaluations, and design and analyze online A/B tests to measure real-world business impact.
  • Collaborate with Data, Engineering and Product stakeholders to identify product opportunities, translate business problems into ML objectives, and align on technical trade-offs.
  • Share knowledge, participate in peer reviews, and actively contribute to the growth and development of other scientists in the ML Guild and the Data Science & Analytics function.

About You

We are looking for Data Scientists who strike a balance between deep technical curiosity and practical business impact, engineers who are passionate about making second-hand fashion highly discoverable.

  • A strong collaborator with hands-on experience designing, training, and deploying machine learning models in a production environment (ideally within search, recommendations, or large-scale personalization).
  • High proficiency in Python and SQL. Experience with deep learning frameworks and gradient boosting libraries.
  • Solid understanding of modern information retrieval, Learning-to-Rank (LTR), semantic search, or sequence-based user preference modeling.
  • Experience or strong interest in high-performance model serving. Familiarity with search/vector engines like Vespa or Elasticsearch, and serving frameworks like Triton, is a plus.
  • Comfort working with massive datasets in modern cloud-based data warehouses.
  • Strong grasp of statistics, offline evaluation metrics, and online A/B testing methodologies.

Work perks

  • The opportunity to benefit from our share options programme
  • 25 working days of holiday
  • Access to all the tools & tech needed for work
  • Home office support: we provide IT workstation equipment and a personal budget of up to €540 for home workplace furniture
  • Private health insurance
  • Digital mental and emotional health support and Employee Assistant Program (EAP)
  • Frequent team-building events
  • A personal monthly budget for shopping on Vinted
  • The opportunity to spend up to 90 days per year - 21 of which can be spent working outside of the EU - on workation
  • A dog-friendly office
  • In Vilnius office: Gym & in-house meals at friendly prices
  • In Kaunas office: a monthly lunch allowance, and a once-a-week provided in-house lunch and breakfast

Working at Vinted

Individual Learning Budget

We invest in your professional growth! As part of our commitment to continuous learning, we offer an annual learning budget to support your personal and career development through courses, certifications, workshops and more.

Hybrid Work

We’ve adopted a hybrid workplace model where 2 days in the office are recommended but not enforced. It’s up to you and your team to decide on the exact days you’ll spend working together in person.

Equal Opportunity

The Vinted Group is committed to building an inclusive workplace where people from all walks of life feel a sense of belonging. We welcome applications from people of all backgrounds, identities and life experiences. At Vinted, all applicants are treated fairly without regard to their race, age, religion or belief, sex, national origin, citizenship, gender identity, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic.

€3.433—€6.233 EUR

Title: Data Scientist (all genders)
Description:
The group you’ll be a part of

In the Global Products Group, we are dedicated to excellence in the design and engineering of Lam's etch and deposition products. We drive innovation to ensure our cutting-edge solutions are helping to solve the biggest challenges in the semiconductor industry.

The impact you’ll make

You will turn complex data into clear, actionable insights to support data-driven decisions. By building scalable solutions and working with cross-functional teams, you will improve analysis and reporting while ensuring data quality and driving innovation. This will help to advance equipment intelligence across the company.

What You’ll Do


Build production-grade Python packages.
Follow and build project scaffolds (PowerShell), follow coding standards, and reproducible workflows.
Transform analyses into standardized currently best-known methods (cBKM)
Process data and automate data flows; manage and optimize data structure & data bases for big data sets.
Interact with product and service teams to identify questions and issues for data analysis and experiments.
Interpret and communicate data analysis results and experiments to product, service & business managers.
Design, build and maintain dashboards.
Process confidential data and information according to guidelines.
Support to setup iterating reports, analysis and dashboards.


Who We’re Looking For


Bachelor or Master Degree: Statistics/Computer Science/Data Science/ /Industrial Engineering
Expert knowledge of Python, statistical modelling (frequentist and Bayesian) and data visualization
Intermediate knowledge of PowerShell, R and SQL
AI expert knowledge
Project management
Comfortable with non-recurrent, high-complexity engineering analyses that drive product decisions
Experience with Industry 4.0 (EI): Best-case has worked in an actual company having Industry 4.0 stuff running
Made predictive maintenance models, deployed and managed them
Expert knowledge of Docker
Skill in project management i.e. being able to break down complex visions into actual work packages
Structured problem solving mindset


What We're Offering

This position is subject to the Austrian Collective Bargaining Agreement (CBA) for Employees in the Metal Technology Industry in the occupation group F. A higher paymentis negotiable depending on education, expertise and skills. The monthly salary is paid 14 times per year.

The position is hired through a third party agency.

Villach - a great place to live and work

Follow the link www.welcome2villach.at and you will find on the spot the most important information aboutliving, working and studying in and around Villach/Austria.

Our commitment

We believe it is important for every person to feel valued, included, and empowered to achieve their full potential. By bringing unique individuals and viewpoints together, we achieve extraordinary results.

Lam Research ("Lam" or the "Company") is an equal opportunity employer. Lam is committed to and reaffirms support of equal opportunity in employment and non-discrimination in employment policies, practices and procedures on the basis of race, religious creed, color, national origin, ancestry, physical disability, mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, marital status, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth and related medical conditions), gender, gender identity, gender expression, age, sexual orientation, or military and veteran status or any other category protected by applicable federal, state, or local laws. It is the Company's intention to comply with all applicable laws and regulations. Company policy prohibits unlawful discrimination against applicants or employees.

Lam offers a variety of work location models based on the needs of each role. Our hybrid roles combine the benefits of on-site collaboration with colleagues and the flexibility to work remotely and fall into two categories – On-site Flex and Virtual Flex. ‘On-site Flex’ you’ll work 3+ days per week on-site at a Lam or customer/supplier location, with the opportunity to work remotely for the balance of the week. ‘Virtual Flex’ you’ll work 1-2 days per week on-site at a Lam or customer/supplier location, and remotely the rest of the time.

Title: Data Scientist (all genders)
Description:
Jobdetails

Als führende Kraft in der Welt des legalen Glücksspiels in Österreich ist es unsere Mission, leidenschaftliche Hingabe für Mensch, Spiel und Umwelt zu beweisen. Wir entwickeln unsere Glücksspielprodukte (wie etwa Lotto, Bingo oder Brieflos) täglich verantwortungsbewusst und mit großem Engagement weiter.

Zur weiteren Verstärkung unseres Teams suchen wir ab sofort eine:n Data Scientist (all genders)

Dein Beitrag zum Glück:


Du bist für das Entwerfen, Entwickeln und Implementieren von ML-basierten Lösungen in einer produktionsbereiten Umgebung unter Verwendung bewährter MLOps-Praktiken zuständig.
Gemeinsam mit dem Data Engineering Team sorgst du dafür ML-Modelle in bestehende Systeme zu integrieren und Workflows zu optimieren.
Weiters stellst du die Skalierbarkeit, Stabilität und Performance von ML-Modellen sicher und kümmerst dich um die Überwachung und Verbesserung der Modelle (inkl. Monitoring und Fehlerbehebung).
Strukturiertes, agiles Arbeiten sowie sorgfältiges Testen nach dem Mehr-Augen-Prinzip und eine saubere fachliche wie technische Dokumentation des Codes sind dir wichtig.
Zudem bist du stets am Puls der Zeit, behältst Trends und neue Technologien im Auge und gewährleistest die kontinuierliche Verbesserung der Modelltrainings- und Deployment-Prozesse.


Darum bist du unser Gewinn:


Abgeschlossene Ausbildung mit IT-Background (HTL/FH/Uni, etc.)
Mehrjährige Berufserfahrung in der Entwicklung von ML-Modellen sowie der Anwendung von MLOps-Praktiken wie Modelltraining, Modellversionierung, Continuous Integration und Deployment (CI/CD), automatisiertes Monitoring usw.
Fundierte Kenntnisse in SQL, PySpark/Python sowie den gängigen Data-Science-Bibliotheken (z.B. scikit-learn, numpy, pandas)
Know-how im Umgang mit Databricks oder anderen Cloud Plattformen von Vorteil
Hohes Qualitätsbewusstsein sowie ausgeprägte Teamorientierung
Sehr gute Deutsch- sowie gute Englisch-Kenntnisse


Mit diesen Technologien arbeiten wir: Databricks (AWS Cloud), Python, PySpark, SQL, dbt, GitLab, MLflow, Jira

Das Gehalt für diese Position richtet sich nach deinen spezifischen Erfahrungen und Qualifikationen. Für diese Position bieten wir ein Jahresbruttogehalt auf Vollzeitbasis ab € 55.000,00

Gleiche Chancen für alle

Jeder Mensch verdient unabhängig von Alter, Geschlecht, Nationalität, Religion, sexueller Orientierung oder Behinderung die gleichen Möglichkeiten, seine Karriereziele zu erreichen. Darum sind wir um ein barrierefreies Umfeld bemüht und stellen individuelle Unterstützung für alle Mitarbeitenden sicher.

Wenn du Fragen rund um Gleichberechtigung und Barrierefreiheit hast oder Unterstützung im Bewerbungsprozess benötigst, melde dich jederzeit: glueckimjob@cal-group.at .

Mehr über unser Headquarter

In unserer Zentrale warten neu renovierte Räumlichkeiten mit modernster Ausstattung auf dich – und das im Herzen Wiens. Die S-Bahn-Station Rennweg, das Schloss Belvedere und die Kärntnerstraße sind nur wenige Geh- bzw. Straßenbahnminuten entfernt, damit du die Groß- und Kulturstadt richtig auskosten kannst.

The Buyer Domain at Vinted is dedicated to creating a seamless, delightful, and highly engaging experience for our members as they search, discover, and purchase items. Our challenge is unique: unlike standard e-commerce, our peer-to-peer catalog consists of hundreds of millions of entirely unique, single-inventory listings, with millions of new items uploaded daily. Connecting the right buyer with the perfect item in real-time is at the very core of Vinted's success.

To tackle this challenge at scale, we are looking to bring talented Data Scientists into the Buyer Domain's two highly specialized, ML-focused teams:

  • Search Relevance: This team is responsible for the retrieval and ranking systems that power search queries across all markets. Their mission is to ensure our members can effortlessly find exactly what they are looking for in Vinted's vast, unique catalog. The team's ownership and focus areas include multi-stage search ranking pipelines, query intent classification, semantic dense retrieval, and the integration of ML relevance models with content policy controls, all optimized for real-time execution.
  • Recommender Relevance: This team owns the Recommender System that powers Vinted’s Homepage Feed and which is responsible for driving a significant portion of all discoveries and purchases across the platform. Their mission is to inspire our members by surfacing highly personalized, engaging, and relevant recommendations. The team's ownership and focus areas include deep sequence-based user modeling, real-time candidate generation and ranking, and exploration of diverse member interests, built to handle massive scale and high-throughput constraints.

We will work with you to match your background, technical interests, and experience with the team where you can drive the most impact. Regardless of the team you join, you will be a proactive product partner. We work in a highly collaborative culture to align on technical approaches, and we validate all changes through rigorous offline evaluation and online A/B testing on our custom-built, in-house Experimentation platform.

In this position, you’ll

  • Build and optimize end-to-end machine learning models for retrieval, ranking, and personalization (e.g. gradient boosting, two-tower architectures, sequence models, and neural rerankers).
  • Partner closely with platform and software engineers to serve models directly in our search and recommendation engines, optimizing for high throughput and millisecond-level latency budgets.
  • Lead or contribute to collaborative design proposals for new modeling approaches, features, or training pipelines.
  • Define tracking requirements, perform offline evaluations, and design and analyze online A/B tests to measure real-world business impact.
  • Collaborate with Data, Engineering and Product stakeholders to identify product opportunities, translate business problems into ML objectives, and align on technical trade-offs.
  • Share knowledge, participate in peer reviews, and actively contribute to the growth and development of other scientists in the ML Guild and the Data Science & Analytics function.

About You

We are looking for Data Scientists who strike a balance between deep technical curiosity and practical business impact, engineers who are passionate about making second-hand fashion highly discoverable.

  • A strong collaborator with hands-on experience designing, training, and deploying machine learning models in a production environment (ideally within search, recommendations, or large-scale personalization).
  • High proficiency in Python and SQL. Experience with deep learning frameworks and gradient boosting libraries.
  • Solid understanding of modern information retrieval, Learning-to-Rank (LTR), semantic search, or sequence-based user preference modeling.
  • Experience or strong interest in high-performance model serving. Familiarity with search/vector engines like Vespa or Elasticsearch, and serving frameworks like Triton, is a plus.
  • Comfort working with massive datasets in modern cloud-based data warehouses.
  • Strong grasp of statistics, offline evaluation metrics, and online A/B testing methodologies.

Work perks

  • The opportunity to benefit from our share options programme
  • 25 working days of holiday
  • Access to all the tools & tech needed for work
  • Home office support: we provide IT workstation equipment and a personal budget of up to €540 for home workplace furniture
  • Private health insurance
  • Digital mental and emotional health support and Employee Assistant Program (EAP)
  • Frequent team-building events
  • A personal monthly budget for shopping on Vinted
  • The opportunity to spend up to 90 days per year - 21 of which can be spent working outside of the EU - on workation
  • A dog-friendly office
  • In Vilnius office: Gym & in-house meals at friendly prices
  • In Kaunas office: a monthly lunch allowance, and a once-a-week provided in-house lunch and breakfast

Working at Vinted

Individual Learning Budget

We invest in your professional growth! As part of our commitment to continuous learning, we offer an annual learning budget to support your personal and career development through courses, certifications, workshops and more.

Hybrid Work

We’ve adopted a hybrid workplace model where 2 days in office are recommended but not enforced. It’s up to you and your team to decide on the exact days you’ll spend working together in person.

Equal Opportunity

The Vinted Group is committed to building an inclusive workplace where people from all walks of life feel a sense of belonging. We welcome applications from people of all backgrounds, identities and life experiences. At Vinted, all applicants are treated fairly without regard to their race, age, religion or belief, sex, national origin, citizenship, gender identity, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic.

The gross monthly salary range for this position is:

€3.433—€6.233 EUR

Title: Data Scientist – TV-Insight
Description:
Are you passionate about creating innovative data-driven products that reshape industries?

TV-Insight is an exciting digital spin-off within Red Bull, located in Elsbethen (Austria), dedicated to revolutionizing the TV measurement and advertisement industry. As a Data Scientist, you will be at the forefront of creating and improving the analytical foundation of our novel product, capable of handling multiple millions of classification tasks every second. Working alongside a team of talented data scientists, data engineers, analysts, and business stakeholders, you will play a key role in defining the success of a state-of-the-art analytics product.

All the responsibilities we'll trust you with:

Model Ownership & Production Deployment

You take ownership of the development and deployment of machine learning models for a dedicated TV-Insight market. This includes building and improving real-time machine learning applications as well as developing model components that feed into real-time projection processing. Working closely with a highly specialized team of engineers and data analysts, you ensure a strong understanding of the technical implementation while setting the highest standards for statistical modelling, creating direct business impact from day one.

Exploratory Analysis, Model Understanding & Communication

You conduct thorough exploratory data analyses to evaluate input data and gain a deep understanding of model behaviour and performance. In both research tasks and day-to-day work, you uphold best practices in modelling approaches and production-quality code. You communicate your insights in a clear and accessible way through dashboards and reports, enabling data-driven decision-making for management and key stakeholders.

Continuous Innovation & Technical Excellence

You continuously stay up to date with technological and industry developments to expand your skill set and strengthen your ability to innovate. You critically assess the potential of new methods, tools, and trends, and proactively implement your own ideas in small-scale experiments to test and validate their expected benefits before scaling them into production.

Your areas of knowledge and expertise that matter most for this role:


Master’s degree or PhD in a highly quantitative field such as Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or a related discipline
3+ years of professional experience in quantitative analytics, data science, or applied statistics.
Strong hands-on experience in statistical modelling using R or Python, with solid experience working with databases and query languages such as SQL.
Proven expertise in applying core statistical methods, including regression, classification, and hypothesis testing, to real-world business problems.
Ability to translate complex analytical results into clear, compelling visualizations and dashboards using tools such as ggplot, R Shiny, or Data Studio.
Strong presentation and communication skills, with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to non-technical audiences and collaborate effectively in cross-functional teams.


Due to legal reasons, we are obliged to disclose the minimum salary according to the collective agreement for this position, which is € 2.362 gross per month. However, our attractive compensation package is based on market-oriented salaries and is therefore significantly above the stated minimum salary.

As an employer, we value diversity and support people in developing their potential and strengths, realizing their ideas and seizing opportunities. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We welcome applications from all members of society irrespective of age, skin colour, religion, gender, sexual orientation or origin.

Title: Data Scientist (Sales & Marketing Focus)
Description:
Do you have the required Data Science skills to drive real impact at one of the most recognisable brands globally?

You'll contribute to Global Data Science projects to enable business stakeholders from various departments incl. (Sales, Marketing, HR) to make better data-driven decisions. The Data Scientist will work closely with other team members to build and run data products, apply statistical analyses to solve business problems that generate impact, and create convincing presentations to demonstrate said impact to the wider organisation.You'll also be responsible for innovation by introducing new data-driven business ideas, new statistical methods, new data products, or by supporting new business processes.

All the responsibilities we'll trust you with:

DELIVER PROJECTS PART OF EXISTING DATA SCIENCE SERVICE LINES

You will support the team by efficiently managing, running, and delivering Data Science projects with a key focus on our Sales, Marketing and HR stakeholders. This end-to-end approach includes everything from project scoping, execution, quality assurance, and delivery via convincing presentations.

SCALE EXISTING DATA SCIENCE INITIATIVES

You will work together closely with IT colleagues to find efficiencies allowing us to scale our initiatives to more people and more Red Bull markets.

DRIVE INNOVATION

Not focusing exclusively on existing service lines and initiatives, you'll actively think along and propose new ways of generating even more value for our stakeholders.

MANAGE EXTERNAL CONSULTANTS

You'll manage our external colleagues and guide them to deliver Data Science projects in an efficient manner, ensuring top notch quality.

STAKEHOLDER MANAGEMENT

You'll build close relationships with internal and external stakeholders. Thanks to your collaborative attitude and ability to absorb constructive feedback, you'll maximise the likelihood of making each and every Data Science initiative a success for the company.

Support The Data Science Manager With Core Responsibilities

You'll work inside the Data Science Team and will support them with impact tracking, projects, pipeline planning, preparing materials for the planning cycles, internal trainings, onboarding new colleagues, internal and external outreach and more.

Your areas of knowledge and expertise that matter most for this role:


2+ Years of professional experience as a Data Scientist or similar role.
Programming: knowledge and practical experience with both Python and SQL. Snowflake is a plus.
FMCG Knowledge: prior experience working at an FMCG company in a data or analytics focused role a plus.
Data Literacy: ability to prepare datasets ensuring top quality such that essence of said data and the implications for the problem at hand can be grasped quickly.
Statistical Reasoning: applied understanding of Stats and Probability and know how to use these tools to reduce uncertainty in a business context (regression, visualisation).
Technical Literacy: applied understanding of modern computing allows the candidate to do things which go beyond the strict definition of Data Science (git, API calls, web crawling, …).
Data Tooling: experience with version control (e.g., Git), familiarity with data transformation tools (e.g., dbt) and exposure to lightweight application frameworks (e.g., Streamlit, Shiny) is a plus.
Presentation Skills: present coherent data stories at the appropriate level of abstraction given the audience.
Stakeholder Management: good at building mutually beneficial connections with functional stakeholders.
Pragmatic Critical Thinking: intuitively consider relevant costs/benefits in all decisions and act accordingly.
Outcome Driven: highly motivated to add value and to demonstrate that impact to the organisation.
Scientific Reasoning/Scoping: ability to define and formulate new questions, in addition to answering given ones.
Grit: proven capability to see things through to the end even if initial feedback is discouraging.


Due to legal reasons, we are obliged to disclose the minimum salary according to the collective agreement for this position, which is EUR 2,504 gross per month. However, our attractive compensation package is based on market-oriented salaries and is therefore significantly above the stated minimum salary.

As an employer, we value diversity and support people in developing their potential and strengths, realizing their ideas and seizing opportunities. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We welcome applications from all members of society irrespective of age, skin colour, religion, gender, sexual orientation or origin.

Title: Data Scientist
HTML:
Als Data Scientist lever je inzichten uit gegevens door het analyseproces te optimaliseren en visuele gegevensrepresentaties te presenteren. Je zoekt, beheert en voegt meerdere gegevensbronnen samen en zorgt voor consistentie van gegevenssets. Je identificeert de wiskundige modellen, selecteert en optimaliseert de algoritmen om bedrijfswaarde te leveren door middel van inzichten. Je stelt patronen vast en beveelt manieren aan om gegevens toe te passen.


Waarom past deze vacature bij jou?

Jij wilt jezelf blijven ontwikkelen en dat zit in ons DNA! Met jouw inzicht in cijfers, data en techniek leg je elke complexiteit simpel uit aan de klant. Klanttevredenheid is belangrijk voor je, dus je luistert goed en geeft inzichtelijke antwoorden die de klant het vertrouwen geeft dat het probleem wordt opgelost. Aan de hand van de informatiebehoefte van jouw stakeholders ontwikkel, test en implementeer je data science-modellen en help je collega’s om de mogelijkheden die schuilen in de rijke data bij onze gerenommeerde klanten, optimaal te benutten. Natuurlijk houd je daarbij de ontwikkelingen in het vak goed in de gaten. Krijg jij energie van het ontdekken van nieuwe kansen met data science? Je voelt je thuis in een informele, collegiale en professionele sfeer waar de aandacht voor de klant en voor de medewerker centraal staan.


Wat kun jij van ons verwachten?

  • Naast een dienstverband voor onbepaalde tijd, een max. salaris van € 8.000, bonusregeling, leaseauto, pensioenregeling en maandelijkse onkostenvergoeding;
  • € 5.000,- opleidingsbudget en daarnaast 5-10 dagen studietijd;
  • Kennissessies met andere SIG Data Analytics en Competence Center Data Analyse, Big data en BI;
  • 25 vakantiedagen en snel oplopend tot 28 vakantiedagen per jaar;
  • Het aan- of verkopen van vakantiedagen;
  • Regelmatig sociale uitjes zoals sportdagen, weekendjes weg en gezellige borrels.


Jouw ontwikkeling, onze prioriteit

We bieden jou persoonlijke ontwikkeling aan en zo werk je aan jouw carrière. Learn, create and make it work is niet alleen onze slogan, maar is ons DNA. Als Data Scientist kun je doorgroeien naar diverse rollen, zoals Data Science Consultant, Business Analist, Senior Consultant.


CIMSOLUTIONS heeft een actief diversiteitsbeleid en streeft naar een evenwichtige verdeling van professionals naar o.a. leeftijd, gender, etnische achtergrond en cultuur, arbeidsvermogen, kennis en competenties. Hierbij benadrukken wij dat wij gelijke kansen belangrijk vinden in de selectie.


Wat breng jij mee?

  • Een afgeronde HBO/WO opleiding met een sterk ICT-component;
  • Ervaring met het structureren en analyseren van grote hoeveelheden data om daarin relevante inzichten te ontdekken;
  • Kennis van artificial intelligence, predictive analysis of Deepen/of Machine learning (libraries zoals TensorFlow, Keras, sklearn, Caffe, Torch);
  • Kennis van en ervaring met één of meerdere analytics tools zoals R, Spark, Storm, HIVE, QlikView, Power BI, Splunk, MatLab, of SAS Suite etc.;
  • Kennis van en ervaring met databasetechnologieën (Hadoop, SQL NoSQL, NewSQL etc.);
  • Ervaring met het visualiseren van data met behulp van de laatste state-of-the-art technologieën;
  • Uitstekende communicatieve vaardigheden in zowel Nederlands als Engels.


Waarom CIMSOLUTIONS?

  • 15 keer Top Employer!
  • Uitstekend salaris;
  • Vrije keuze leaseauto;
  • € 5000,- opleidingsbudget;
  • Aantrekkelijke bonussen;
  • Veel sociale evenementen;
  • Uitdagende projecten;
  • Gevarieerde opdrachten;
  • Gerenommeerde klanten.


Ben je overtuigd?

We willen graag kennis met je maken. Solliciteer vrijblijvend of neem contact met ons op via:

  • Mail: recruitment@cimsolutions.nl;
  • Telefoon: 0499-366 000;
  • of bezoek onze website: www.cimsolutions.nl/werken-bij/

Title: Full Stack Data Scientist
Description:
Are you a Full Stack Data Scientist driven by turning data into tangible business results? Do you want to help organizations become more productive and competitive?

Vuono Group is now looking for Full Stack Data Scientists to join our growing team of experts in Helsinki. Vuono Group is a consultancy that drives business value with processes and AI. We empower Nordic organisations in both the private and public sectors to bridge the gap between business needs and AI capabilities, enabling smarter decision-making, increased operational efficiency, and accelerated growth.

About The Role

As a Full Stack Data Scientist, you are interested in what happens under the hood of modern data solutions and data architectures. You care about data quality, usability and the value it can provide for various business processes. You're experienced with data science and engineering practices, including data observability, implementing MLOps (maybe even LLMOps) workflows and real-time data processing. You understand the intersection of ML/AI systems and data engineering and can build scalable pipelines that support both analytical and operational use cases. Experience with cloud-native data architectures (e.g. Azure, AWS, GCP) is essential.

At Vuono Group, you will get to work in a cross-competence team making our clients' businesses more intelligent with data. In practice, this means building data pipelines, integrating systems together, and utilising ML and AI for insights and operational use cases.

What We’re Looking For


Experience in planning and building production level data solutions that solve real business problems
An analytical mindset and problem-solving skills
Machine learning modeling and/or natural language processing experience
Experience in designing and implementing end-to-end data pipelines that transform raw operational data into business-ready information products
Experience in running and monitoring production workloads
Programming experience in Python and SQL
Willingness and readiness to learn and operate with new technology platforms, tools, whether low code like Celonis or Fabric or pro code like new cloud infrastructure
MSc degree in Machine Learning, Data Science and Artificial Intelligence, Data Engineering, Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science or similar
Professional-level Finnish and English language proficiency


The Following Is Considered a Plus


Interest in continuously learning and applying new technologies and platforms; generative AI, RAG, AI Agents, among others
Experience with various tech stacks, e.g. AWS Databricks, Azure Data Factory, Microsoft Fabric, DBT, Apache Kafka, Terraform, or similar
Experience in utilising data from business technology platforms, such as ERP, CRM or similar (SAP, Salesforce, ServiceNow, etc.)
Experience in transforming data for process and content intelligence purposes
Previous consulting experience


You don’t need to tick every box! What matters most is your drive to make a real impact!

What We Offer

We are building the best work environment for data, AI and business process professionals. To get there, we invest in the well-being and work-life balance as well as the professional development of our people. We operate on trust and transparency rather than titles, fostering a high-autonomy, growth-oriented environment where collaboration, impact, and everyone’s unique thoughts and ideas are valued.

In addition to the usual perks, such as work tools of your choice and extensive healthcare benefits, we also offer our employees the opportunity to invest in our rapidly growing company via an employee share program.

Work with Leading Nordic Companies

At Vuono Group, you’ll collaborate with Nordic clients on a range of challenging digital projects. Along the way, you’ll have the opportunity to influence technical decisions, architecture, and how solutions are built. Explore some of our client cases here.

Next steps

We’re always on the lookout for new talent, which is why we recruit on a rolling basis. If this opportunity feels like the right fit for you, take the next step and submit your application! Once we receive your application, we’ll be in touch.

Our recruitment process typically includes at least two interviews, giving you the chance to meet some of our team members and giving us the opportunity to get to know you better: as a professional, a colleague, and a person. Reference checks are also a standard part of our process. We look forward to hearing from you!

Vuono Group is a process AI company. We create superior business processes through data and AI. Our growing team of kind and ambitious people is on a mission to turn AI into real, measurable business impact. Take the next step, explore our open positions and connect with us to find your next opportunity!

Title: AI Engineer
Description:
Casumo is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

Join us at Casumo, where you are invited to be your authentic YOU-MO!

Company Overview

Welcome to Casumo, your passport to a world of fun, excitement, and responsible gaming. We're an international online casino company with a knack for creating unforgettable gaming experiences. Our secret sauce? A blend of innovation, security, and a dash of playful charm.

Nowadays, we're on the hunt for an AI Engineer to join our team!

Position Overview

As an AI Engineer, you will design and implement AI solutions to automate processes, enhance personalization, and drive innovation. Key responsibilities include identifying AI opportunities, ensuring compliance, monitoring model performance, and safeguarding data security. You’ll lead AI lifecycle management and stay updated on advancements to deliver impactful and ethical solutions aligned with business goals.

Responsibilities


Manage and implement AI use cases that enhance business processes through automation, personalisation, and innovation.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (e.g., marketing, operations, compliance) to identify opportunities where AI can deliver tangible business benefits.
Lead the development and integration of Generative AI (GenAI) tools.
Work closely with business analysts and stakeholders to gather requirements and define technical specifications for AI solutions.
Build machine learning models using supervised and unsupervised learning techniques, including (but not limited to) linear regression, logistic regression, decision trees, support vector machines (SVM), naive bayes, k-means clustering, random forests, neural networks, natural language processing (NLP), deep learning, etc.
Oversee the entire AI/ML Ops lifecycle, from ideation and model development to deployment into production and ongoing monitoring.
Ensure robust testing, version control, and continuous integration of AI models into the production environment.
Implement monitoring and performance tracking systems to ensure AI models deliver consistent results and can be retrained as needed.
Ensure that all AI initiatives comply with the company’s AI governance framework, emphasising security, compliance, and ethical standards.
Monitor AI/ML model usage to prevent bias, discrimination, or unethical outcomes, ensuring AI systems are transparent and fair.
Work closely with legal and compliance teams to ensure AI tools comply with relevant regulations (e.g., GDPR, EU AI Act) and industry standards.
Ensure that all AI implementations follow security best practices, particularly when handling sensitive player data.
Collaborate with data security teams to prevent unauthorised access, breaches, and data manipulation in AI processes.
Implement data privacy measures and ensure that AI-driven tools handle personal and behavioural data in a compliant and secure manner.
Stay at the forefront of AI advancements and GenAI technologies to bring innovative solutions to the business.
Work closely with data engineers and tech teams to ensure seamless integration of AI solutions into existing systems and data platforms.
Collaborate with the product and business teams to align AI solutions with broader strategic goals.
Identify areas for improvement in AI models, tools, and processes to enhance their efficiency, accuracy, and scalability.
Continuously research emerging AI technologies and techniques, particularly in GenAI, to keep the company ahead of the competition.
Conduct post-deployment evaluations to refine AI solutions and ensure optimal performance over time.


Requirements:


Bachelor’s degree in data science, computer science, information systems, data engineering, or a related field.
2+ years of experience in AI, machine learning, or data science roles, with hands-on experience in developing and deploying AI solutions.
Experience with Generative AI tools and techniques (e.g., GPT models, Transformer models) is essential.
Experience building and deploying machine learning models into production, including supervised and unsupervised learning techniques.
In-depth knowledge of machine learning algorithms: linear regression, logistic regression, decision trees, random forests, support vector machines (SVM), naive bayes, k-means clustering, neural networks, and deep learning.
Expertise in designing and deploying agentic AI workflows and integrations via n8n, Make, or similar automation platforms.
High proficiency in AI-native development environments such as Claude Code, Cursor, Google Antigravity, etc., accelerating the software development lifecycle.
Strong experience in AI/ML Ops, with a proven track record of successfully deploying AI models into production.
Advanced SQL skills and proficiency in scripting languages (e.g., Python, R) for data processing, machine learning, and automation.
Experience with data pipelines, AI tool monitoring, and AI tool/model retraining processes in an AI Ops environment.
Familiarity with cloud-based AI/ML platforms (e.g., AWS SageMaker, Google AI Platform, Azure AI, Snowflake Cortex AI).
Strong understanding of AI ethics, security, compliance, and regulatory requirements (e.g., GDPR).
Experience working with AI governance frameworks, ensuring AI solutions are secure, compliant, and ethically sound.
Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking skills, with a focus on delivering business value through AI.
Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work cross-functionally across business and technical teams.
Strong project management skills, with the ability to prioritise tasks, manage timelines, and meet deadlines.
Experience managing multiple projects simultaneously and delivering them on time.
Ability to translate technical concepts into business-friendly language.
Strong documentation skills with attention to detail in managing documentation.
Eagerness to learn and adapt to new technologies, tools, and methodologies in the rapidly evolving AI landscape.
Willingness to stay up to date with the latest trends and best practices in AI and data management.
Previous experience in the iGaming industry is a plus.


Please note: As Casumo is an international company and English is our working language, we kindly ask you to submit your CV in English.

The Perks

Being a part of the Casumo group provides an unparalleled experience. You’ll find yourself surrounded by the brightest minds within the most inspiring and collaborative office spaces! In addition to that, you’ll enjoy:

Our Zagreb Office


Private health insurance
Wellness incentives, including a fitness allowance and mental well-being services
2 weeks Work From Anywhere (10 days), increased to 4 weeks (20 days) after longer duration of employment within the Company: explore the world while working remotely
Food allowance
Access to some of the greatest tools and platforms for developing your professional skills and building success within your role
A range of training courses, known as Casumo College, for continuous learning and growth
Social events for building strong relationships with colleagues from all across the organisation


Our Malta Office


Private health insurance
Wellness incentives, including a fitness allowance and mental well-being services
Flexible national holidays: public holidays mean more time off, choose how and when to enjoy them!
2 weeks Work From Anywhere (10 days), increased to 4 weeks (20 days) after longer duration of employment within the Company: explore the world while working remotely
Gourmet lunches and healthy snacks prepared by our in-house chef
Variety of discounts from local vendors
Access to some of the greatest tools and platforms for developing your professional skills and building success within your role
A range of training courses, known as Casumo College, for continuous learning and growth
Social events for building strong relationships with colleagues from all across the organisation


Our Skopje Office


Private health insurance
Wellness incentives, including a fitness allowance and mental well-being services
2 weeks Work From Anywhere (10 days), increased to 4 weeks (20 days) after longer duration of employment within the Company: explore the world while working remotely
Office lunches - three times per week
Access to some of the greatest tools and platforms for developing your professional skills and building success within your role
A range of training courses, known as Casumo College, for continuous learning and growth
Social events for building strong relationships with colleagues from all across the organisation


Our ABC Values

ASPIRE

At Casumo, "aspire" means pushing beyond the ordinary and transforming obstacles into stepping stones. Challenges are our breakfast of champions, and comfort zones are out of bounds. Mediocrity? Left behind. Our mantra? Dream big, aim high, and always be ready for the next adventure in innovation.

BELIEVE

Belief at Casumo isn't just a feel-good sticker; it's the glue that binds us. Turning "me" achievements into "we" victories, we're a tight-knit crew of dreamers, doers, and relentless supporters. With a high-five arsenal and a trusty cheerleading squad, we're on a mission to prove that together, we're not just strong; we're Casumo strong.

CARE

Care is our secret ingredient, the cherry on top of our game. It's not only about ensuring our players have a blast (responsibly, of course); it's about weaving a fabric of support so tight, even the toughest challenges can't tear us apart. From tailoring player experiences to being there for each other, we're all about creating memorable moments.

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
We’re looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our growing team! If you’re passionate about turning complex, scattered data into meaningful insights and have a strong command of Python and its data libraries — we want to hear from you.


Tasks



Aggregate and process structured and unstructured data from multiple sources (APIs, databases, CSVs, etc.)


Clean, transform, and analyze datasets for actionable insights


Apply clustering techniques and segmentation (e.g., K-Means, DBSCAN, hierarchical clustering)


Build and evaluate data models for internal tools and business needs


Communicate findings through clear visualizations and concise summaries


Collaborate closely with developers, product managers, and business stakeholders



Requirements



Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience in data science or a similar analytical role


Strong proficiency in Python and commonly used libraries: pandas, numpy, scikit-learn, matplotlib, seaborn, etc.


Solid understanding of data structures, statistics, and machine learning fundamentals


Experience working with relational databases (SQL)


Ability to structure and interpret complex datasets independently


Communication skills, both written and verbal


References from previous projects or employers are required





Nice to Have:





Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., Azure, AWS, GCP)


Familiarity with time-series data, anomaly detection, or recommender systems


Exposure to data visualization tools like Tableau or Power BI



Benefits


We offer a range of benefits to support your growth, wellbeing, and long-term success:





Modern office in a central location, with collaborative workspaces and a friendly team culture


Extra vacation days beyond the national standard


Annual holiday and Christmas bonuses


Performance-based bonuses tied to individual and team results


Equity opportunity through our ESOP (Employee Stock Ownership Plan)





Join Recommend as a Data Scientist and innovate content solutions for global brands. Be part of a dynamic team in thriving industry. Your expertise can make a difference!

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
Key responsibilities:

Developing machine learning and statistical models using structured and unstructured data.
Designing and implementing data analysis workflows, data pipelines, and reproducible analytical processes.
Developing scripts, prototypes, and components for production-ready data science solutions.
Evaluating model performance, data quality, statistical validity, and practical usefulness of analytical outputs.
Compiling technical documentation, methodological notes, reports, presentations, and contributions to technical offers.
Collaborating with statisticians, data analysts, software developers, project managers, and external experts.




Applicants must meet the following requirements:

University degree (B.Sc. or equivalent) in Statistics, Data Science, Computer Science, Mathematics or a related field
Postgraduate degree (at least M.Sc. or equivalent) in Statistics, Data Science, Computer Science, Mathematics or a related field
4+ years of hands-on professional experience in Statistical Analysis, Data Science and Machine Learning (ML).
Proficiency in Python or R
Good knowledge of SQL
Experience in working with structured and/or unstructured data
Working proficiency in Git/GitHub
Hands-on experience with data preprocessing, feature engineering, model evaluation, and reproducible analytical workflows
Proficiency in English, both written and oral (C2 level certificate or proof of experience in the use of English at the same level)
Fulfilled military service obligations or permanent exemption from them (for male Greek citizens)

 

Additional qualifications that will be considered favourably:

Experience in Natural Language Processing, Large Language Models, or text analytics
Familiarity with containerization and deployment concepts, Docker, cloud-based analytics, Kubernetes, Azure Cloud or other cloud-based platforms. Relevant professional certifications are considered an asset
Strong ability to communicate statistical results, create charts, and present reports to working groups
Experience in the compilation of methodological documents, research articles and technical offers
Experience in European R&D projects

 

The company provides a modern working environment, training, a satisfactory remuneration package.

 

Please submit your CV to the following address: cv@quantos-stat.com. Please note that we will store it in our database for one year and will then delete it. For more information about how we treat personal data you may consult Quantos’ Personal Data Protection Policy.

Title: Medior Data Scientist / ML Engineer
Description:
Bedrijfsomschrijving

Sopra Steria biedt op maat gemaakte end-to-end corporate technology- en softwareoplossingen die organisaties helpen gedurfde keuzes te maken en meetbare resultaten te boeken. Met meer dan 51.000 collega’s in bijna 30 landen behoren we tot de top van de Europese leveranciers van digitale oplossingen. Succesvolle organisaties in Europa vertrouwen op onze technologie vanwege onze voortdurende focus op innovatie, samenwerking en zakelijke ontwikkeling. The world is how we shape it. Let’s shape it together.

Vacatureomschrijving

Je kan waardevolle inzichten halen uit grote datasets. Als Data Scientist ontfutsel je deze door je vloeiend kennis van programmeertalen als Python en R en visualisatietools als Tableau en PowerBI. Je kan die inzichten communiceren naar stakeholders zodat ze de nodige stappen kunnen zetten. Onze data scientists zijn vaardig in Hadoop & Spark en cloudplatformen als AWS en Azure. Deze tools – samen met je data expertise – zorgen ervoor dat het bouwen van voorspellende modellen, het uitvoeren van hypothesis tests en het uitvoeren van verkennende data-analyse je heel natuurlijk af gaan.

Als Data Engineer zal je:


ruwe data omzetten in bruikbare inzichten en
schaalbare oplossingen
je richten op het ontwerp en de optimalisatie
van data-infrastructuur
processen automatiseren
zorgen voor een naadloze levering van data
microservices ontwikkelen om data lakes
toegankelijker en nuttiger te maken


Je zoekt steeds naar innovatieve manieren om de schaalbaarheid en bruikbaarheid van data te verbeteren. Van de eerste conceptontwikkeling tot de uiteindelijke implementatie—jij ontwikkelt en implementeert data oplossingen die sterke resultaten opleveren en de strategische doelen van onze klanten ondersteunen.

Functie-eisen

We zijn op zoek naar gepassioneerde collega’s die graag de grenzen willen verleggen op het gebied van digitale transformatie en technologie consulting. Bij Sopra Steria krijg je de kans om te werken aan impactvolle projecten en je vaardigheden te ontwikkelen in een constructieve teamomgeving. Jij wilt tot de besten behoren. Dat is waarom jij altijd naar manieren zoekt om jouw kennis uit te breiden en op de hoogte te blijven van de laatste trends en ontwikkelingen. Hou je van een uitdaging en vind je jezelf in (de meeste van) deze criteria? Dan kijken we nu al uit naar jouw sollicitatie.

Type werk: Hybrid

Locatie: Groningen, NL

Contracturen: 36-40

Type contract: Vast

Opleiding: HBO, WO, PhD

Ervaring: 3-4 jaar

Talen: Nederlands

Je hebt kennis van of ervaring in:

Need: Python, SQL, cloud platform (Azure, AWS, GCP), git, docker

Nice to have: BI, R, Databricks, wiskundige optimalisatie, Specialisatie(e.g. Tabular ML, Computer vision, NLP, Deep Learning), MLOps/devOps, Verantwoorde AI kennis, big data/distributed computing, ETL/ELT, Presentatie vaardigheden

Je zal deel uitmaken van een grote naam in de tech wereld die bekend is om consulting, digitale diensten en softwareontwikkeling. Je begeeft je tussen high-level professionals die durven in te zetten om hoge resultaten te behalen.

Aanvullende informatie

Je zal deel uitmaken van een grote naam in de tech wereld die bekend is om consulting, digitale diensten en softwareontwikkeling. Je begeeft je tussen high-level professionals die durven in te zetten om hoge resultaten te behalen.

Bij Sopra Steria zorgen we ervoor dat jij je werk met plezier én in balans kunt doen. Daarom bieden we een aantrekkelijk en flexibel pakket aan arbeidsvoorwaarden:


Een vast contract.
Vakantiegeld van 8%;
Een royaal mobiliteitsbudget in de vorm van een leaseregeling met de


keuze uit een elektrische leaseauto met NS Business Card of leasefiets of een alternatief vervoersregeling – net wat het beste bij jouw manier van reizen past;


Winstdeling van 8% on target (of OTB vast bedrag, afhankelijk van de functie);
27 betaalde vakantiedagen;
Flex benefit van € 1.800, - per jaar met daar bovenop een extra percentage van jouw salaris. Dit budget kan worden gebruikt voor zaken als aankoop van extra vrije dagen of extra sparen in jouw pensioenregeling;
Thuiskantoor met laptop, telefoon en een maandelijkse internetvergoeding;
Hybride werken: thuis of op kantoor, afhankelijk van wat jij nodig hebt;
Ontwikkelmogelijkheden via trainingen, kennisdelingssessies en inspirerende (netwerk)events;
Sociale activiteiten met collega’s – van gezellige borrels tot sportieve of inhoudelijke uitjes;
Een flexibele pensioenregeling, waaraan jij op maat en passend bij jou, bijdragen kan toevoegen.
Je kunt deelnemen aan de collectieve zorgverzekering.


Lijkt deze job iets voor jou?

Ben je klaar om met ons de wereld vorm te geven? Fantastisch! We kijken nu al uit naar jouw sollicitatie.

______

Sopra Steria is een werkgever die gelijke kansen biedt. Alle gekwalificeerde sollicitanten worden in aanmerking genomen voor een job zonder rekening te houden met leeftijd, afkomst, nationaliteit, huidskleur, verlof voor familie- of medische zorg, geslachtsidentiteit of -uitdrukking, genetische informatie, immigratiestatus, burgerlijke staat, medische toestand, nationale herkomst, fysieke of mentale handicap, politieke voorkeur, beschermde veteranen- of militaire status, ras, etniciteit, religie, geslacht (inclusief zwangerschap), seksuele geaardheid of enig ander kenmerk dat wordt beschermd door toepasselijke lokale wetten, voorschriften en verordeningen. We koesteren een werkomgeving die inclusief is en alle verschillen respecteert.

HTML:
Bedrijfsomschrijving

Sopra Steria biedt op maat gemaakte end-to-end corporate technology- en softwareoplossingen die organisaties helpen gedurfde keuzes te maken en meetbare resultaten te boeken. Met meer dan 51.000 collega’s in bijna 30 landen behoren we tot de top van de Europese leveranciers van digitale oplossingen. Succesvolle organisaties in Europa vertrouwen op onze technologie vanwege onze voortdurende focus op innovatie, samenwerking en zakelijke ontwikkeling. The world is how we shape it. Let’s shape it together.

Vacatureomschrijving

Je kan waardevolle inzichten halen uit grote datasets. Als Data Scientist ontfutsel je deze door je vloeiend kennis van programmeertalen als Python en R en visualisatietools als Tableau en PowerBI. Je kan die inzichten communiceren naar stakeholders zodat ze de nodige stappen kunnen zetten. Onze data scientists zijn vaardig in Hadoop & Spark en cloudplatformen als AWS en Azure. Deze tools – samen met je data expertise – zorgen ervoor dat het bouwen van voorspellende modellen, het uitvoeren van hypothesis tests en het uitvoeren van verkennende data-analyse je heel natuurlijk af gaan.

Als Data Engineer zal je:

  • ruwe data omzetten in bruikbare inzichten en
  • schaalbare oplossingen
  • je richten op het ontwerp en de optimalisatie
  • van data-infrastructuur
  • processen automatiseren
  • zorgen voor een naadloze levering van data
  • microservices ontwikkelen om data lakes
  • toegankelijker en nuttiger te maken

Je zoekt steeds naar innovatieve manieren om de schaalbaarheid en bruikbaarheid van data te verbeteren. Van de eerste conceptontwikkeling tot de uiteindelijke implementatie—jij ontwikkelt en implementeert data oplossingen die sterke resultaten opleveren en de strategische doelen van onze klanten ondersteunen.

Functie-eisen

We zijn op zoek naar gepassioneerde collega’s die graag de grenzen willen verleggen op het gebied van digitale transformatie en technologie consulting. Bij Sopra Steria krijg je de kans om te werken aan impactvolle projecten en je vaardigheden te ontwikkelen in een constructieve teamomgeving. Jij wilt tot de besten behoren. Dat is waarom jij altijd naar manieren zoekt om jouw kennis uit te breiden en op de hoogte te blijven van de laatste trends en ontwikkelingen. Hou je van een uitdaging en vind je jezelf in (de meeste van) deze criteria? Dan kijken we nu al uit naar jouw sollicitatie.

Type werk: Hybrid

Locatie: Groningen, NL

Contracturen: 36-40

Type contract: Vast

Opleiding: HBO, WO, PhD

Ervaring: 3-4 jaar

Talen: Nederlands

Je hebt kennis van of ervaring in:

Need: Python, SQL, cloud platform (Azure, AWS, GCP), git, docker

Nice to have: BI, R, Databricks, wiskundige optimalisatie, Specialisatie(e.g. Tabular ML, Computer vision, NLP, Deep Learning), MLOps/devOps, Verantwoorde AI kennis, big data/distributed computing, ETL/ELT, Presentatie vaardigheden

Je zal deel uitmaken van een grote naam in de tech wereld die bekend is om consulting, digitale diensten en softwareontwikkeling. Je begeeft je tussen high-level professionals die durven in te zetten om hoge resultaten te behalen.

Aanvullende informatie

Je zal deel uitmaken van een grote naam in de tech wereld die bekend is om consulting, digitale diensten en softwareontwikkeling. Je begeeft je tussen high-level professionals die durven in te zetten om hoge resultaten te behalen.

Bij Sopra Steria zorgen we ervoor dat jij je werk met plezier én in balans kunt doen. Daarom bieden we een aantrekkelijk en flexibel pakket aan arbeidsvoorwaarden:

  • Een vast contract.
  • Vakantiegeld van 8%;
  • Een royaal mobiliteitsbudget in de vorm van een leaseregeling met de

keuze uit een elektrische leaseauto met NS Business Card of leasefiets of een alternatief vervoersregeling – net wat het beste bij jouw manier van reizen past;

  • Winstdeling van 8% on target (of OTB vast bedrag, afhankelijk van de functie);
  • 27 betaalde vakantiedagen;
  • Flex benefit van € 1.800, - per jaar met daar bovenop een extra percentage van jouw salaris. Dit budget kan worden gebruikt voor zaken als aankoop van extra vrije dagen of extra sparen in jouw pensioenregeling;
  • Thuiskantoor met laptop, telefoon en een maandelijkse internetvergoeding;
  • Hybride werken: thuis of op kantoor, afhankelijk van wat jij nodig hebt;
  • Ontwikkelmogelijkheden via trainingen, kennisdelingssessies en inspirerende (netwerk)events;
  • Sociale activiteiten met collega’s – van gezellige borrels tot sportieve of inhoudelijke uitjes;
  • Een flexibele pensioenregeling, waaraan jij op maat en passend bij jou, bijdragen kan toevoegen.
  • Je kunt deelnemen aan de collectieve zorgverzekering.

Lijkt deze job iets voor jou?

Ben je klaar om met ons de wereld vorm te geven? Fantastisch! We kijken nu al uit naar jouw sollicitatie.

______

Sopra Steria is een werkgever die gelijke kansen biedt. Alle gekwalificeerde sollicitanten worden in aanmerking genomen voor een job zonder rekening te houden met leeftijd, afkomst, nationaliteit, huidskleur, verlof voor familie- of medische zorg, geslachtsidentiteit of -uitdrukking, genetische informatie, immigratiestatus, burgerlijke staat, medische toestand, nationale herkomst, fysieke of mentale handicap, politieke voorkeur, beschermde veteranen- of militaire status, ras, etniciteit, religie, geslacht (inclusief zwangerschap), seksuele geaardheid of enig ander kenmerk dat wordt beschermd door toepasselijke lokale wetten, voorschriften en verordeningen. We koesteren een werkomgeving die inclusief is en alle verschillen respecteert.

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
At Desquared, we're on a mission to build the world's most loved digital products, shaping lasting relationships with team members and clients, promoting business growth and personal happiness.




Our meticulously crafted proprietary products and our award-winning agency work have enabled us to partner with industry leaders such as Deutsche Telekom, Cosmote, National Bank of Greece, Alpha Bank, Kritikos, Heron, and Public. Through these partnerships, we positively affect millions of people every month.




Our culture and processes are the product of Lean UX Design and Agile Development principles. We are committed to delivering top-quality experiences through a deep understanding of business, extensive user research, and robust engineering practices.




We are currently looking for a skilled Data Scientist with a strong focus on developing AI-driven product features and tools. If you have a passion for building innovative solutions and excel at tackling complex data challenges, consider joining our team.




Responsibilities

Interpret business requirements as actionable Machine Learning tasks.
Conduct Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) and perform feature engineering.
Execute comparative modeling experiments to optimize model training.
Implement best practices in model selection and parameter tuning.
Deploy and integrate models into production environments.




Requirements

2+ years of working experience in Data Science and Machine Learning.
Proficiency in programming languages such as Python or R.
Strong understanding of statistical analysis, regression models, and machine learning algorithms.
A drive to learn and master new technologies and techniques.
Strong communication and collaboration skills.
Excellent problem-solving and learning ability.
Familiarity with Git.
Proven literacy in English.
Military obligations must be fulfilled (if applicable).

Optional skills that will make you stand out:

Familiarity with Generative AI models.
Knowledge of advanced machine learning techniques like deep learning or reinforcement learning.
Familiarity with non-relational database systems, such as MongoDB.
Experience in relational databases and SQL.
Practical knowledge of BigQuery for handling large datasets.
Experience in deploying models into production environments.
Familiarity with cloud-hosting platforms, such as Heroku or AWS.




Benefits

Collaborate with a supportive, talented team of experts.
Work in a dynamic and creative environment where you can make a difference.
Make an impact on the everyday lives of millions of people.
Enjoy a highly competitive salary and benefits package.
Collaborate with some of the largest and most prestigious institutions.
Benefit from a flexible hybrid working model.
Work with top-of-the-line tools and equipment.
Access our extensive library and ongoing training resources.

Title: Full Stack Data Scientist
Description:
Millaisesta työstä sinä innostuisit juuri nyt?




Olisiko työn haastettava ja kehitettävä taitojasi? Tulisiko sen tuottaa tunne, että olet tekemässä jotain merkittävää? Haluaisitko työskennellä työyhteisössä, jossa välittäminen näkyy jokapäiväisissä teoissa ja kohtaamisissa?




Mitä jos sanoisimme, että meillä työskennellessäsi nämä kaikki seikat yhdistyvät yhdeksi – sinun erinomaiseksi työntekijäkokemukseksesi.




🧑 🚀 Lyhyt kuvaus työstäsi Full Stack Data Scientistina

Kanssamme luot asiakkaillemme liiketoiminnallista arvoa ja konkreettista kilpailuetua auttamalla heitä tekemään parempia päätöksiä datan avulla.




Konsultoit, kehität ja viet eteenpäin innovaatioita, jotka auttavat yrityksiä ja yhteisöjä toimimaan fiksusti ja ketterästi. Teet monimutkaisesta yksinkertaista uusimmilla teknologioilla, tehokkaimmilla laskentatavoilla ja parhailla käytännöillä.




Teknologisesta näkökulmasta erilaiset tietovarastot, laskentaympäristöt ja datankäsittelytyökalut ovat osa arkeasi siinä missä pilvipalvelut (AWS, ja Azure ja GCP) sekä ohjelmointikielet ovat erottamaton osa työtäsi.




Vielä lisää konkretiaa

Olemme ylpeitä, kuinka jatkuva oppiminen on luonnollinen osa nitorilaisten päivittäistä asiakasprojektissa työskentelyä. Lue Data Scientistimme, Tuukka Stewenin oppimismatkasta.

Täältä pääset tutustumaan Finnairille toteuttamaamme operatiivisen toiminnan työkaluun.

Data Scientistimme ja projektissa mukana ollut tuleva työkaverisi Jukka kertoo kokemuksiansa projektista ja meillä työskentelystä täällä.

Miltä dataosaajamme työpäivä näyttää – käy vilkaisemassa Eeron tarina.




🤝 Dataliiketoimintamme on yksi kasvualueistamme




Meillä on kokemusta ja osaamista merkittävien toimeksiantojen toteuttamiseen. Asiakastyytyväisyytemme on huippuluokkaa ja kehitämme jatkuvasti toimintaamme.




Katseemme on myös vahvasti tulevassa. Kun tulet työkaveriksemme, uskomme, että se vie meitä taas askeleen eteenpäin – samalla kun katsomme sinulle uraasi ja kehittymistäsi tukevat toimeksiannot, joissa työskentelet yhdessä toisten nitorilaisten kanssa. Meillä saat toteuttaa näköistäsi työelämää yhteiseen tulevaisuuteemme vaikuttaen.




Tuleva data-asiantuntijoiden tiimisi on tiivis startup-henkinen ja uuden oppimista arvostava, jolta löytyy poikkeuksellisen korkeatasoista dataosaamista. Ja jos palaset loksahtavat kohdalleen, tätä joukkoa sinä täydennät juuri sellaisena kuin olet.




✅ Mitä sinä voisit tuoda mukanasi?




Tässä tehtävässä loistat, kun sinulla on ohjelmointikokemusta, kyky kehittää koodia modernein menetelmin sekä matemaattisen ajattelun mentaliteetti ja taito. Olet kiinnostunut tekoälystä ja koneoppimisesta. Koska ala menee eteenpäin vauhdilla, on tärkeää, että olet innostunut uuden omaksumisesta ja näet haasteet mahdollisuuksina.




Mitä enemmän sinulla on osaamista, se luonnollisesti tarjoaa enemmän mahdollisuuksia heti ensimetreistäsi lähtien. Emme kuitenkaan halua liian tarkkaan määrittää tässä kohtaa, millainen sinun tulisi olla. Palaset kun voivat loksahtaa kohdalleen niin monella tapaa.




🏆Mitä jos valitsisitkin meidät?

Me uskomme, että rekrytoinnissa ei ole kyse siitä, että yritys valitsee uuden työntekijän. Sinä lopulta teet valinnan. Ja me voimme sinua siinä auttaa.




Sinun kannattaa olla meihin yhteydessä, jos

haluat työskennellä mielekkäiden toimeksiantojen parissa relevantteja, uusia asioita oppien.
rinnallasi työskentelevät osaavat kollegat, erinomaiset kouluttautumismahdollisuudet sekä optimaaliset työolosuhteet ja -välineet ovat sinulle tärkeitä asioita.
koet, että yhteisöllisyys ja toisille hyvän tahtominen ovat työelämässä merkityksellisiä arvoja.
sinusta on ihan ok tehdä normityöaikaa ja huolehtia, että vapaat ja työt pysyvät balanssissa.
työskentelet mielelläsi pitkäaikaisissa asiakkuuksissa projektista toiseen poukkoilun sijaan.




Työskentelyäsi ja arkeasi tukevat meillä myös muuten hyvin monimuotoiset edut ja mahdollisuudet:




Voit esimerkiksi käyttää 10 % työajastasi ammatilliseen kehittymiseen.
Palkitsemme suorittamasi sertifikaatit bonuksin (500–2000 €/sertifikaatti).
Saat käyttöösi 7100 € työvälineiden hankkimiseen.
Sinulla on mahdollisuus palkalliseen lomaan heti meillä aloitettuasi.
Lisäksi meillä on kattavat henkilöstöedut ja innostavaa yhteistä ajanviettoa.




⭐ Haluaisitko jutella kanssamme tarkemmin, mitä me voisimme sinulle tarjota?

Liity nyt data-ammattilaistemme, koodareidemme, suunnittelijoidemme ja valmentajiemme joukkoon työskentelemään luovassa sekä byrokratiavapaassa työkulttuurissa.




Olisimme todella innostuneita kuulemaan sinusta lisää. Kerro, millaista askelta olet urallasi ottamassa, ja katsotaan, miten me voisimme sinua auttaa.




❓Onko mielessäsi kysymyksiä? Pohdituttaako jokin seikka?

Lähetä meille viesti niin People Partnerimme Ella Raskila (ella.raskila@nitor.com) vastaa kaikkiin kysymyksiisi ja auttaa sinua. Varmistetaan, että saat kaiken tarvitsemasi tiedon sinulle tärkeän päätöksen tekemiseksi.




👥 Me kuuntelemme sinua

Me haluamme tarjota työntekijöillemme parhaan mahdollisen työpaikan ja tukea sinun osaamisesi kehittymistä. Nitorilla juuri sinä, ainutlaatuiset taitosi ja henkilökohtaiset kiinnostuksen kohteesi määrittävät urasi suunnan.

Kiehtovat projektit, luontainen uteliaisuutemme ja kollegojesi tuki motivoivat sinua jatkuvassa oppimisessa. Osallistut mielenkiintoisiin koulutuksiin, tapahtumiin ja konferensseihin. Lisäksi voit käyttää osan työajastasi uuden oppimiseen, yhteisömme kehittämiseen sekä sinua inspiroiviin pro bono –projekteihin.

Meillä urapolkusi ei ole ennalta määrätty – päinvastoin, kannustamme sinua tutkimaan kiinnostuksen kohteitasi ilman turhaa hierarkiaa ja byrokratiaa. Nitorilla äänesi kuuluu.




🎯 Lyhyesti Nitorista – toivottavasti sinunkin tulevasta työpaikastasi

Jokainen nitorilainen on pragmaattinen ja ratkaisukeskeinen tiimipelaaja, joka ei tyydy oletuksiin. Meille ominaista ovat todella korkea ammattitaito ja ylpeys niin omasta kuin kollegoidemmekin työstä.

Yli 250 asiantuntijaamme toimivat Helsingissä, Tampereella ja Tukholmassa, yhdistäen monipuoliset osaamisensa merkityksellisten vaikutusten saavuttamiseksi. Olemme ylpeitä työntekijälähtöisestä kulttuuristamme ja aidosta sitoutumisestamme ihmistemme kasvuun – tunnustuksena tästä meidät on palkittu Great Place to Work -sertifikaatilla sekä valittu Suomen vetovoimaisimmaksi työnantajabrändiksi.




Visiomme on selkeä: olla alan halutuin työpaikka, jossa menestys syntyy työntekijöiden ja asiakkaiden hyvinvoinnista ja tyytyväisyydestä. Jatkamme kasvuamme IT-alan asiakastyytyväisyyden suunnannäyttäjänä tuottaen erinomaista lisäarvoa asiakkaillemme (lue, miten ainutlaatuinen asiakaskokemus ruokkii kasvuamme).
