Title: Data Scientist 3
Description:
Job Summary

Webstaurant Store, the world’s largest online restaurant supply company, is looking for a full-time Data Scientist to join the Data Science team. The Data Scientists are responsible for supplying statistical rigor to the organization’s analytics projects, aimed at discovering actionable insights and opportunities for growth and optimization.

This role can be remote in some US states (See below for remote work requirements) or based in one of our offices (Lititz, PA or Tampa, FL).

Responsibilities

Responsibilities include, but are not limited to:


Advising on analysis and modeling techniques, selecting the best fit for structured & unstructured, complex data, and developing custom analytics models to generate insights that drive value for our customers and unlock competitive advantage for our organization.
Collaborating with our analytics engineers to gather the right information from various sources so that you can implement advanced statistical methodologies and design interventions to optimize our business performance.
Conducting exploratory analysis including hypothesis testing, statistical inference, and statistical analysis (predictive and/or prescriptive).
Partnering with business and technical stakeholders to translate challenging retail business problems into state-of-the-art data science solutions.
Developing processes and tools that monitor, analyze and continuously improve model performance and data accuracy.
Work with other data scientists to design and implement experiments and glean actionable insights from experimental analyses.
Defend and explain the validity of predictive/ML models to those without a background in data science or statistics.
Actively research new tools and technologies, staying on top of analytics news and best practices.


Physical Requirements


Work is performed while sitting/standing and interfacing with a personal computer.
Requires the ability to communicate effectively using speech, vision, and hearing.
Requires the regular use of hands for simple grasping and fine manipulations.
Requires occasional bending, squatting, crawling, climbing, and reaching.
Requires the ability to occasionally lift, carry, push, or pull medium weights, up to 50lbs.


Remote Work Qualifications


Access to a reliable and secure high-speed internet connection. Cable or fiber internet connections (at least 75mbps download/10mbps upload) are preferred, as satellite connections often cannot support the technologies used to perform day-to-day tasks.
Access to a home router and modem.
A dedicated home office space that is noise- and distraction-free. The space should have strong wireless connection or a wired Ethernet connection (wired connection is preferred, if possible).
A valid, physical address (apartment, suite, etc.). PO Boxes are not supported, as a physical address is required for you to receive your computer equipment.
The desire and ability to work and communicate with other team members via chat, webcam, etc.
Legal residents of one of the following states: (AK, AL, AR, AZ, CT, DE, FL, GA, IA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NM, NV, OH, OK, PA, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WI, WV, or WY). H-1B Visa Sponsorship Not Available, W2 only.


Experience


Minimum 2 years of work experience in Data Science, or a PhD in math, statistics, economics, or a modeling-related field.
Advanced Python and SQL skills.
You have a proven ability with statistical methods and advanced modelling techniques; extra points if you have experience with one or more of the following: ecommerce search, recommendation engines, dynamic pricing, or user matching/data cleanrooms.


Education

This role does not require a degree. We value relevant skills and experience and alignment with our core values above all else.

Desired Traits & Skills

The ideal candidate will possess the following qualities:


You Communicate Effectively: Ability to explain ideas simply and confidently to team members both written and verbally.
You have an Entrepreneurial Spirit: Takes it upon themselves to find ways to add value to the team and business. They are self-motivated and creative in their quest to find actionable insights and new solutions. They can often be found saying “What if we tried this?” or “Maybe this is a better way to do it?” They have a knack for overcoming obstacles.
You Desire to Grow: Constantly seek to improve themselves and expand their professional knowledge and skill set.
You’re an inquisitive, out-of-the box thinker who’s continually on the lookout for opportunities to improve and innovate data science solutions.
You have consistently high standards; your passion for quality is inherent in everything that you do.
Familiarity with a variety of supervised/unsupervised/reinforcement learning methods.
Demonstrable portfolio (git repos, kaggle competitions, etc) of machine learning projects.
You have proven ability as a full stack data scientist who develops, experiments, optimizes, and scales models for the production environment.
You connect the how and why, using your knowledge of data science theories and methodologies to derive the best approach that is fit-for-purpose.


Company Overview

The foodservice professional’s premier source for restaurant equipment, supplies, and knowledge online. Our purpose is to empower and equip people to run their businesses more profitably and efficiently.

Title: Machine Learning Engineer
Company: Réseau des Jeunes Féministes d'Afrique Centrale -REJEFEMAC
Description:
Role Description

This role is for a Machine Learning Engineer responsible for developing, implementing, and maintaining machine learning solutions that support business objectives and data-driven decision-making. In this position, you will work with data, algorithms, and software systems to build intelligent applications and improve existing processes.

As a Machine Learning Engineer, you will collaborate with data scientists, software engineers, and business stakeholders to transform requirements into practical machine learning solutions. You will assist in preparing data, training models, evaluating performance, and deploying machine learning applications into production environments.

The role involves monitoring model performance, optimizing workflows, and ensuring that machine learning systems operate efficiently and reliably. You will also support testing, troubleshooting, and continuous improvement efforts to enhance the accuracy and effectiveness of AI-driven solutions.

This position is ideal for candidates who enjoy working with both software development and data-driven technologies. It focuses on the practical implementation and deployment of machine learning systems rather than advanced academic research.

The Machine Learning Engineer plays a key role in enabling intelligent automation, predictive analytics, and scalable AI solutions across the organization.

Key Responsibilities
Develop, test, and deploy machine learning models and applications
Prepare, clean, and process data for model development
Evaluate model performance and optimize results
Support the deployment and maintenance of machine learning systems
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define use cases and requirements
Monitor model accuracy, reliability, and performance
Troubleshoot and resolve model or data-related issues
Document machine learning workflows, processes, and solutions
Improve automation and predictive capabilities through machine learning
Stay updated on machine learning technologies, tools, and best practices
Qualifications
Basic to intermediate understanding of machine learning concepts and techniques
Familiarity with Python or other programming languages used in data and AI projects
Understanding of data processing, model training, and evaluation workflows
Knowledge of machine learning libraries or frameworks is a plus
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Ability to work with structured and unstructured data
Attention to detail and a structured approach to development
Good communication and teamwork skills

Desired Traits & Skills

The ideal candidate will possess the following qualities:

  • You Communicate Effectively: Ability to explain ideas simply and confidently to team members both written and verbally.
  • You have an Entrepreneurial Spirit: Takes it upon themselves to find ways to add value to the team and business. They are self-motivated and creative in their quest to find actionable insights and new solutions. They can often be found saying “What if we tried this?” or “Maybe this is a better way to do it?” They have a knack for overcoming obstacles.
  • You Desire to Grow: Constantly seek to improve themselves and expand their professional knowledge and skill set.
  • You’re an inquisitive, out-of-the box thinker who’s continually on the lookout for opportunities to improve and innovate data science solutions.
  • You have consistently high standards; your passion for quality is inherent in everything that you do.
  • Familiarity with a variety of supervised/unsupervised/reinforcement learning methods.
  • Demonstrable portfolio (git repos, kaggle competitions, etc) of machine learning projects.
  • You have proven ability as a full stack data scientist who develops, experiments, optimizes, and scales models for the production environment.
  • You connect the how and why, using your knowledge of data science theories and methodologies to derive the best approach that is fit-for-purpose.

The foodservice professional’s premier source for restaurant equipment, supplies, and knowledge online. Our purpose is to empower and equip people to run their businesses more profitably and efficiently.

Title: Growth Associate
Description:
About Venn

Venn is building modern financial infrastructure for Canadian businesses. Built in Canada for Canadian entrepreneurs, Venn gives over 10,000 businesses access to the tools they need to manage money faster, easier, and more affordably.




We've raised an $21.5m Series A from Tier 1 investors, and we're rapidly growing and looking to hire A-players to change the future of banking in Canada.




Note: This role is 5 days a week in our Office located on Richmond and Spadina in downtown Toronto




What You'll Be Doing

Build the 0 → 1 product marketing and growth engine across channels: You’ll own Venn’s voice, narrative, and market presence across channels while building the systems we’ll scale from scratch, including product launch motions, brand messaging, campaign planning, tooling, channel strategy, and content distribution.
Own the narrative and messaging across Venn's product launches, website, content strategy, customer emails, and onboarding flows to improve acquisition and retention
Lead product launches and own the GTM plan for new products / features — narrative, positioning, assets, content, rollout, and tracking
Own and operate all social media channels, including LinkedIn, curating content and case studies for both the Venn brand and our founders to grow awareness and authority + discover new channels
Define and refine how Venn's products are perceived in the market, crafting compelling narratives that resonate with different ICPs.
Own the website and make it conversion-ready by constantly iterating to enhance messaging, drive conversions, and communicate product value effectively.
Create and execute a strategy for blogs, case studies, email campaigns, and educational content that drive conversions and engagement.




What we’re looking for:

Minimum 3+ years of full-time (non-internship) experience, including a minimum 2+ years at a tier-1 consulting firm, investment bank, or major technology company, plus at least 1 year of experience at a startup, as a founder, or as a creator/influencer
Strong understanding of product positioning, content distribution, engagement metrics, and audience growth.
Experience optimizing website content, SEO, and conversion rates.
Ability to analyze data, run experiments, and iterate based on insights.
Excellent copywriting, editing, and storytelling skills.
Strong cross-functional collaboration skills, especially with product and sales teams.
Ability to manage projects end-to-end, working with internal teams and contractors.
Self-starter and able to own and execute strategies end-to-end




This is not a new-grad role. Please only apply if you completed your undergraduate degree in 2023 or earlier.




Bonus Points

Experience at an early-stage or fast-growing startup
Experience at a fintech
Experience with video
Currently leveraging AI to automate / accelerate processes (e.g., Claude Code)




Perks & Benefits

Healthy equity ownership, among the most generous in the market, aligning your success with the company’s growth
Comprehensive coverage of medical, dental, and vision insurance
Opportunity to shape the future of business banking in Canada and beyond

Title: Director, Data Science
Description:
Omnicom Media (OM), the media services division of Omnicom Group Inc. (NYSE: OMC) – delivers transformational experiences for consumers, clients, and talent. Powered by the Omni marketing orchestration system, OM connects best-in-class capabilities that enable our full-service media agencies OMD, PHD, and Hearts & Science to deliver more relevant and actionable consumer experiences, more productive and proactive client experiences, and more collaborative and rewarding talent experiences for the more than 24,000 people serving the world’s leading brands in OM agencies around the globe.




Team Overview

We are a team of engaged data-curious professionals who continuously seek new and improved ways to learn from our extensive data assets. We share ideas, code, outcomes, and credit for our collective efforts. We're looking for explorative, independent data scientists to grow with us as we tackle ever-changing challenges.




Position Overview

As a company, we serve as the foundational data and technology layer in which analytics and insights can be accessed through a single lens. Our main goal is to advance our clients’ advertising and marketing strategies through the use of smart data and technology application that unlock insights and drive business results.

Our unique approach to data and technology – one that relies on transparency, neutrality, and interoperability – allows us to deliver purpose-built and scalable solutions that make data actionable. We have teams of analysts, data and marketing scientists, consultants, and technical experts to help us meet the business goals of our clients.

Join our dynamic and diverse team – data solutions for marketers, by marketers.




Key Responsibilities

As a member of the Data Science team, you will work with agency strategists and media buyers to create solutions that shape the strategic direction of your client’s marketing plans through data-driven insights, audience solutions, and measurement techniques.

This will involve:

Interacting with client and programmatic teams (internal agency and external) to plan & execute optimization strategies as well as test & measurement plans related to media performance
Working with tech partners directly regarding data, clean rooms, custom bidding platform functionality, and troubleshooting related issues
Working with data from ad servers, DSPs, measurement partners, and other online and offline datasets to develop client-specific solutions
Collaboratively ideating and building tools that aid with analysis and ML transparency, visualization, and performance measurement

Required Skills And Qualifications

6+ years of industry experience; knowledge of ad-tech ecosystem, programmatic advertising, and agency work experience a plus
Bachelor’s degree in statistics, mathematics, economics, engineering, information management, social sciences, or business/marketing related fields
Advanced quantitative degree or intensive bootcamp experience is preferred
Must have hands-on expertise in Python; SQL proficiency preferred
Experience with cloud computing platforms such as AWS or GCP
Experience managing data scientists and end-to-end analytics projects
Direct exposure to client media, marketing, and analytics teams




Our culture and working style within the group fosters a positive, productive, entrepreneurial team spirit. We demonstrate a strong working knowledge of media across all channels and are data driven in our approach. We use analytic and technical knowledge to identify the most effective strategies to address our clients’ needs. We also work to stay sharp and up to date with our skills and trends in the marketplace that help us bring the best for our clients.




This is the pay range the Company believes it will pay for this position at the time of this posting. Consistent with applicable law, compensation will be determined based on relevant experience, other job-related qualifications/skills, and geographic location (to account for comparative cost of living). The Company reserves the right to modify this pay range at any time. For this role, benefits include: health insurance, vision insurance, dental insurance, 401(k), Healthcare Flexible Spending Account, Dependent Care Flexible Spending Account, vacation days, sick days, personal days, paid parental leave, paid medical leave, and STD/LTD insurance benefits.

Compensation Range

$140,000—$170,000 USD

This role is hybrid, requiring three (3) days per week in the office. The remaining two (2) days may be worked remotely. Specific in-office days will be discussed during the interview process, with flexibility to align with team needs. Please note that the number or required in-office days may be adjusted over time, potentially increasing the number of required in-office days based on business needs.

Review Our Recruitment Privacy Notice

Title: Entry Level Management Trainee
Description:
Entry Level Management Trainee

Location: Tampa, FL

Compensation: Competitive Salary + Bonuses




Are you looking for a career in sales and marketing with the opportunity to grow into management?




We are seeking a motivated Entry-Level Management Trainee to join our team in Tampa, FL. This is a face-to-face sales and marketing role, ideal for an individual who is passionate about working with people, learning new skills, and developing into a future leader.




As an Entry-Level Management Trainee, you will be directly involved in showcasing our products and services to customers through face-to-face interactions. You will also receive comprehensive training to understand the ins and outs of sales, marketing, and leadership. This role is perfect for someone who enjoys engaging with customers, is eager to learn, and is motivated by success.




Key Responsibilities:

Face-to-Face Sales & Customer Interaction: Engage directly with customers to showcase products, answer questions, and drive sales.
Sales Strategy Development: Learn and assist with the development and execution of sales strategies that attract new customers and retain existing ones.
Leadership Training: Receive mentorship and training to develop your leadership and team management skills.
Promotional Events: Assist with coordinating and executing marketing campaigns, events, and activations to increase brand visibility.
Customer Relationship Building: Build strong customer relationships to ensure long-term satisfaction and repeat business.
Team Collaboration: Work alongside other team members to meet sales goals and provide feedback to improve operations.




What We’re Looking For:

Excellent Communication Skills: The ability to effectively communicate with people is essential for success in this face-to-face sales environment.
Positive and Motivated Attitude: We are seeking individuals who are enthusiastic, proactive, and eager to grow.
Customer-Focused: A passion for working directly with customers to provide an exceptional experience.
Goal-Oriented: Someone driven by targets and performance, with a focus on achieving business goals.
Team Player: Willingness to collaborate with others and contribute to the success of the team.
No Prior Experience Required: We provide full training, so this role is perfect for those starting their careers in sales and marketing.




What We Offer:

Comprehensive Training Program: You will receive full training in face-to-face sales, marketing strategies, and leadership development.
Career Growth: Opportunities for rapid career advancement into management roles for those who demonstrate leadership potential.
Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary with performance-based bonuses.
Supportive Work Environment: Join a team that supports your development and success with a focus on growth and collaboration.
Dynamic Work Culture: Work in a fast-paced, exciting environment where your ideas and contributions are valued.




If you’re looking for an entry-level role that combines sales, marketing, and leadership development with a focus on face-to-face customer interaction, apply now for the Entry-Level Management Trainee position in Tampa, FL. Kickstart your career and grow with us!

Title: AI Data Engineer
Description:
We are looking for an experienced Data Engineer to join a growing data and AI team, helping to build modern data solutions that support advanced analytics and machine learning.

This role centres on building robust data ingestion pipelines within Snowflake and delivering predictive analytics using Snowflake Cortex. While the majority of machine learning will leverage Snowflake's managed ML capabilities, there will also be opportunities to develop bespoke Python models where business requirements extend beyond native functionality.

You will play a key role in designing scalable data engineering solutions, preparing high-quality datasets, and ensuring production-ready machine learning outputs are delivered to downstream applications.

Key Responsibilities
Design, build and maintain scalable data ingestion pipelines into Snowflake from structured and time-series data sources.
Develop predictive analytics solutions using Snowflake Cortex, including forecasting, anomaly detection and classification.
Prepare machine learning datasets through feature engineering, windowed aggregations and time-series transformations.
Develop custom machine learning models using Python and Snowpark (including scikit-learn, XGBoost and LightGBM) where native Snowflake capabilities are not suitable.
Integrate machine learning outputs into downstream applications and analytics platforms.
Monitor and maintain production data pipelines and machine learning solutions, including data quality, model refreshes and performance monitoring.
Optimise Snowflake performance and ensure data engineering best practices are followed.
Required Skills & Experience
Strong commercial experience with Snowflake, including SQL, Streams, Tasks, Snowpipe and performance optimisation.
Experience using Snowflake Cortex ML capabilities for forecasting, anomaly detection and classification.
Strong Python development skills, including Snowpark.
Experience building data pipelines and preparing datasets for machine learning.
Knowledge of time-series data processing and feature engineering techniques.
Experience developing machine learning models using libraries such as scikit-learn, XGBoost or LightGBM.
Understanding of production monitoring, data quality and model lifecycle management.
Desirable Experience
Experience with Snowflake ML features such as Model Registry and Feature Store.
Knowledge of Azure Data Lake, Microsoft Fabric or other modern cloud data platforms.
Familiarity with Snowflake AI capabilities such as AISQL, Cortex Search or related technologies.

Title: Social Media Strategist
Description:
About Us

Beast Industries is a multifaceted media and entertainment company founded by Jimmy Donaldson, popularly known as MrBeast, the most watched person in the world. Renowned for revolutionizing digital content creation, Beast Industries encompasses a diverse portfolio of ventures that extend far beyond its origins on YouTube. With a mission to entertain, inspire, and create significant social impact, Beast Industries operates across various domains including digital media, philanthropy, consumer products, and innovative business initiatives. At Beast Industries, we believe in the transformative power of digital media and its potential to entertain, educate, and effect positive change. Our commitment to innovation, creativity, and philanthropy drives us to explore new frontiers, create unforgettable experiences, and build a legacy that inspires future generations.

About The Role

The Social Media Strategist is the strategic role for social media operations across Beast Industries’ CPG brands, including Feastables, MrBeast Apparel, MrBeast Labs, Lunchly, and future Beast-owned properties. This role supports the strategy that determines how each brand shows up, stays ahead of culture, and ensures the right ideas make it to production.

You’re the filter between raw creative energy and strategic execution. You work closely with the creative team to pressure-test ideas, bring trend intelligence and competitive context to the table, and drive the thoughtfulness behind every concept before it reaches the Head of Content. Your value is measured by how sharp, strategically grounded, and culturally relevant the team’s output becomes because of your influence.

The ideal candidate thinks in systems, not just posts. They bring deep platform fluency, trend forecasting discipline, competitive rigor, and strategic instinct to know when a creative concept is right for the moment, right for the brand, and right for the audience, or when it needs to be killed, redirected, or elevated. While Feastables is the highest-volume brand in the portfolio, this role requires shifting strategy across distinctly different product categories and audiences.

What You'll Do
Develop social media strategies for tentpole brand moments, seasonal pushes, and product launches, defining the strategic narrative, platform approach, and content mix before creative execution begins
Lead ongoing trend research across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, X/Twitter, and emerging platforms, surfacing opportunities, relevant formats, sounds, and cultural moments to the creative team with context on timing and brand fit
Work closely with the creative team to filter, refine, and pressure-test content concepts, bringing strategic insight, audience understanding, and competitive context to ensure the strongest ideas move forward
Build and maintain a competitive intelligence practice: monthly audits across each brand’s category analyzing what competitors are winning attention on social, what’s falling flat, and where Beast brands have whitespace to own
Track how brands (gaming, fashion, entertainment) engage Gen Z and Gen Alpha audiences and translate relevant tactics into Beast brand-applicable strategies
Pull and analyze social analytics from Emplifi and platform dashboards weekly and monthly, translating performance data into clear insights that inform creative direction, content mix, and platform prioritization
Write detailed MrBeast channel integration briefs including talking points, product highlights, brand expectations, and retailer callouts aligned to each brand’s comms calendar
Build creative decks and strategic presentations for campaign pitches, strategy updates, and cross-functional alignment
Collaborate with the Creator Partnerships Manager to evaluate creator-brand fit and ensure partnership activations align with brand strategy and audience targets
Define and refine how each Beast brand should show up on each platform, including voice, format preferences, posting cadence, and content mix, and evolve that positioning as platforms and audiences shift
Contribute strategic input to social copy and creative briefs, ensuring platform-specific language drives conversation and shareability rather than defaulting to marketing language
Maintain a reference library of high-performing content examples from competitors, creators, and adjacent categories for team-wide learning and creative team inspiration
Adapt and shift between brand voices, tones, and audience contexts quickly, recognizing that what works for Feastables may not work for Apparel or Lunchly, and vice versa
What We're Looking For
3-5 years of experience in social media strategy, content strategy, or brand strategy for consumer-facing brands
Demonstrated ability to translate trend research and competitive analysis into actionable creative direction
Strong analytical skills with experience pulling insights from social analytics platforms (Emplifi, Sprout, or similar) and translating data into strategic recommendations
Proven ability to write compelling strategic briefs and campaign frameworks that give creative teams clear direction without being prescriptive
Deep, demonstrable fluency in internet culture, meme formats, creator ecosystems, and short-form video trends
Experience working across multiple brands or products
Preferred Skills
Experience working alongside or embedded within a creative team in a strategic advisory capacity
Background in or strong understanding of the MrBeast content ecosystem and creator-native video formats
Experience with TikTok Shop content strategy or social commerce
Track record of identifying trends early and shaping how a brand responds to them
Experience developing campaign strategies for product launches or seasonal brand moments
Consumer brand, apparel, entertainment, creator economy, or agency experience
BenefitsThe Perks, Why Work On the MrBeast Team

We are redefining what entertainment and storytelling look like at global scale. Every piece of content we publish reaches millions and influences culture in real time. This is your opportunity to lead the team that decides how those moments come to life across every screen.

Competitive Salary
Generous Medical (Blue Cross Blue Shield), Dental, Vision and company-paid Life Insurance 
Company contributions to employee Health Savings Accounts (HSA) 
401k Plan with Safe Harbor company-matching
Flexible vacation policy and paid company holidays
Company-provided technology package 
Relocation assistance where applicable, including travel and company-provided housing for the first 90 days

While Feastables is the highest-volume brand in the portfolio, this role requires shifting strategy across distinctly different product categories and audiences.

What You'll Do
  • Develop social media strategies for tentpole brand moments, seasonal pushes, and product launches, defining the strategic narrative, platform approach, and content mix before creative execution begins
  • Lead ongoing trend research across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, X/Twitter, and emerging platforms, surfacing opportunities, relevant formats, sounds, and cultural moments to the creative team with context on timing and brand fit
  • Work closely with the creative team to filter, refine, and pressure-test content concepts, bringing strategic insight, audience understanding, and competitive context to ensure the strongest ideas move forward
  • Build and maintain a competitive intelligence practice: monthly audits across each brand’s category analyzing what competitors are winning attention on social, what’s falling flat, and where Beast brands have whitespace to own
  • Track how brands (gaming, fashion, entertainment) engage Gen Z and Gen Alpha audiences and translate relevant tactics into Beast brand-applicable strategies
  • Pull and analyze social analytics from Emplifi and platform dashboards weekly and monthly, translating performance data into clear insights that inform creative direction, content mix, and platform prioritization
  • Write detailed MrBeast channel integration briefs including talking points, product highlights, brand expectations, and retailer callouts aligned to each brand’s comms calendar
  • Build creative decks and strategic presentations for campaign pitches, strategy updates, and cross-functional alignment
  • Collaborate with the Creator Partnerships Manager to evaluate creator-brand fit and ensure partnership activations align with brand strategy and audience targets
  • Define and refine how each Beast brand should show up on each platform, including voice, format preferences, posting cadence, and content mix, and evolve that positioning as platforms and audiences shift
  • Contribute strategic input to social copy and creative briefs, ensuring platform-specific language drives conversation and shareability rather than defaulting to marketing language
  • Maintain a reference library of high-performing content examples from competitors, creators, and adjacent categories for team-wide learning and creative team inspiration
  • Adapt and shift between brand voices, tones, and audience contexts quickly, recognizing that what works for Feastables may not work for Apparel or Lunchly, and vice versa
What We're Looking For
  • 3-5 years of experience in social media strategy, content strategy, or brand strategy for consumer-facing brands
  • Demonstrated ability to translate trend research and competitive analysis into actionable creative direction
  • Strong analytical skills with experience pulling insights from social analytics platforms (Emplifi, Sprout, or similar) and translating data into strategic recommendations
  • Proven ability to write compelling strategic briefs and campaign frameworks that give creative teams clear direction without being prescriptive
  • Deep, demonstrable fluency in internet culture, meme formats, creator ecosystems, and short-form video trends
  • Experience working across multiple brands or products
Preferred Skills
  • Experience working alongside or embedded within a creative team in a strategic advisory capacity
  • Background in or strong understanding of the MrBeast content ecosystem and creator-native video formats
  • Experience with TikTok Shop content strategy or social commerce
  • Track record of identifying trends early and shaping how a brand responds to them
  • Experience developing campaign strategies for product launches or seasonal brand moments
  • Consumer brand, apparel, entertainment, creator economy, or agency experience
BenefitsThe Perks, Why Work On the MrBeast Team

We are redefining what entertainment and storytelling look like at global scale. Every piece of content we publish reaches millions and influences culture in real time. This is your opportunity to lead the team that decides how those moments come to life across every screen.

  • Competitive Salary
  • Generous Medical (Blue Cross Blue Shield), Dental, Vision and company-paid Life Insurance 
  • Company contributions to employee Health Savings Accounts (HSA) 
  • 401k Plan with Safe Harbor company-matching
  • Flexible vacation policy and paid company holidays
  • Company-provided technology package 
  • Relocation assistance where applicable, including travel and company-provided housing for the first 90 days
